features.name: Project Baseline Verification
features.description: Project installs cleanly, all tests pass, import smoke checks succeed, init.sh runs without errors
features.evidence: pytest tests/ -v passes; import smoke checks pass; init.sh runs clean

features.name: Structure Generation Pipeline
features.description: Bulk, surface, defect, adsorbate, and dopant modules produce valid ASE Atoms objects for Ni, perovskite, and fluorite systems
features.evidence: Modules implemented: bulk.py, surface.py, adsorbates.py, defects.py, dopants.py, decomposition.py, exsolution.py. Tests in test_smoke.py cover imports and instantiation.

features.name: VASP Calculator Interface
features.description: VASPInputGenerator produces correct INCAR/KPOINTS/POSCAR for relaxation, frequency, and NEB workflows
features.evidence: VASPInputGenerator importable and tested in CI lint job

features.name: Analysis and Thermochemistry
features.description: Energetics, thermochemistry, microkinetic, RDS, and surface comparison modules provide post-processing for DFT results
features.evidence: Modules implemented: energetics.py, thermochemistry.py, microkinetic.py, rds.py, surface_comparison.py, electronic.py

features.name: Doped Fluorite Electrolytes (GDC/YSZ/ScSZ)
features.description: Dopant module supports multiple fluorite hosts and dopant species with correct charge compensation
features.evidence: Generalized in commit ea26b63; tutorial at tutorials/doped_fluorite.md; analyze_dopant_distribution generalized with host_cation param, 7 regression tests; ce_total backward-compat alias added for Ce hosts

features.name: Audit: nh3sofc/structure/ (8 files)
features.description: Audit structure subpackage for bugs, type inconsistencies, and lint issues. Scope: bulk.py, surface.py, adsorbates.py, defects.py, dopants.py, decomposition.py, exsolution.py, __init__.py. Oracle: mypy clean, no logic bugs, no unit/sign errors, tests pass.

features.name: Audit: nh3sofc/calculators/ (8 files)
features.description: Audit calculators subpackage (vasp + mace) for bugs, type inconsistencies, and lint issues. Oracle: mypy clean, VASP input generation logic correct, tests pass.
features.evidence: Fixed 5 bugs (INCAR case mismatch, Hubbard U f-orbital, VDW key case, cm-1 conversion, is_converged false positive), 4 lint issues, 1 API inconsistency. 12 regression tests added. 83 tests pass. Commit d6dd99c.

features.name: Audit: nh3sofc/analysis/ (8 files)
features.description: Audit analysis subpackage for bugs, unit/sign errors, and type inconsistencies. Scope: energetics.py, thermochemistry.py, microkinetic.py, rds.py, surface_comparison.py, electronic.py, exsolution.py. Oracle: mypy clean, no unit/sign/normalization bugs, tests pass.

features.name: Audit: nh3sofc/workflows/ (7 files)
features.description: Audit workflows subpackage for bugs, type inconsistencies, and lint issues. Scope: relaxation.py, neb.py, frequency.py, decomposition.py, screening.py, exsolution.py. Oracle: mypy clean, no logic bugs, tests pass.

features.name: Audit: nh3sofc/database/ + core/ (7 files)
features.description: Audit database and core subpackages for bugs, type inconsistencies, and lint issues. Oracle: mypy clean, no logic bugs, tests pass.
